---
title: "Score-Based Generative Model on a Real Dataset with OT-Guided Sampling"
date: 2026-06-10
categories: [GDL + COT]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)](https://github.com/shreeshb51/shreeshb51.github.io/blob/main/projects/Score-Based%20Generative%20Model%20on%20a%20Real%20Dataset%20with%20OT-Guided%20Sampling/project_4_score_based_gm_with_ot_guided_sampling.ipynb)
- [Mathematical Framework](mathematical_framework.md)
- [Solving an Anchor Example](solving_anchor_example.md)

---
